name: @gotong/acp-agent
description: Gotong outbound ACP adapter — spawns a coding agent (Claude Code / Codex via their ACP bridges) ONCE and holds a long-lived Agent Client Protocol session (JSON-RPC over NDJSON on stdio), dispatching many tasks to the SAME session with context preserved. The OpenClaw-style complement to the one-shot @gotong/cli-agent. Five seams (observe / intercept / handoff / resume / terminate) with a fail-closed permission gate (AGENT-ADAPTER-CONTRACT).
